steps.title: Locate the middle position
steps.content:
The values are already listed in order. With $7$ values, the median is the fourth value because
$$\frac{7+1}{2}=4$$

steps.title: Read the fourth value
steps.content: Counting through the ordered list $3,3,3,5,6,6,16$, the fourth value is $5$. The answer is B.
